title: Teledyne Marine Announces Sale of Three Gavia AUVs to Terradepth
text: REYKJAVIK, Iceland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--A global leader in the manufacture of Unmanned Maritime Systems, Teledyne Marine Vehicles announces that Terradepth, a disruptor in the maritime data collection and management space, has greatly expanded its survey operations capabilities by acquiring three Teledyne Marine Gavia autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) to support the rollout of its Ocean Data as a Service and Absolute Ocean data platform. “We are excited that Terradepth chose our AUV as the bes

title: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Q4 Earnings Beat, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Q4 earnings of $4.56 increase 23.9% from the year-ago quarter's $3.68 per share. Its sales also exceeded the consensus estimate.

title: 3M: Mixed, Mediocre, And Modest
text: 3M has been lagging in terms of operating and share price performance in recent years. The company rightfully deserved the license to operate a conglomerate over the past decade, but is struggling a bit in recent times.

title: Aerospace Stocks to Watch for Earnings on Jan 27: TDY, TXT & NOC
text: Aerospace sector Q4 earnings are expected to significantly improve from the prior year quarter and revenues are projected to be up 3.7%. TDY, TXT and NOC are stocks to watch.

title: Will Strong Sales Volume Aid Teledyne's (TDY) Q4 Earnings?
text: Teledyne Technologies' (TDY) Q4 results are likely to have gained from the FLIR acquisition along with solid sales volume performance. Strong cost-reduction efforts may have boosted quarterly earnings.

title: Teledyne Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Earnings Webcast Details
text: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) will hold a conference call to discuss its fourth quarter and full year 2021 results on Thursday, January 27, 2022, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific. A press release with the fourth quarter and full year financial results will be issued before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday January 27, 2022. To access the call, go to www.teledyne.com/investors/events-and-presentations approximately ten minutes befo
